excerpts.text: Hanji, Thanks sabhi ko support ke liye. Just 1 reminder ki Sunday ko hum admission stop kr denge course me. Jitne b students ho jaate h, unhi ko push krna h course finish krne ke liye and unhi ke saath time spend krenge.
Hanji, Open source n tokens? Build for non tech people is the secret.
hanji, ye video to dekhna bnta h aur sabhi college group me share b bnta h. Simple and clean steps to take and focus on big picture.
Work hard, learn fast. If he can do it, you can too. There is enough resource on my YouTube channel. Just get serious.
A college asked students to drop learning development otherwise they will not allow him to sit in placements. Do AI or ML projects only.
1 API call se AI project bna do to khush ho jayenge but vo student vaise hi zindgi se ghabraya hua h
Dekho ji, sachhai to yahi h ki DSA se hi sab hoga. Ye development, software engineering to 1 din sikh hi jaoge. Ye sab faltu kaam h. Sirf DSA pe focus kro. Isi se job lagegi.

It is very hard to fight with mainstream trend. Aur trend ye h ki janta ko DSA ke 200-300 questions lagane h. Chalo laga b lo, din ke 4 leke chale to b 2 month se zyada ka khel nhi. But pura saal soch me hi nikl gya ki krunga.
Kuch log sikh ke nikl b gye n aap motivation hi lete rh gye ji.
Instagram trying to be twitter, twitter trying to be youtube. Youtube trying to be tiktok. Can someone just bring yahoo messenger and chat rooms back.
Almost done with cohort, now it's time for farming. Simple life.
Time management is not about doing a hundred things. It's about just doing a very few things, but consistently.
You want to work out? Consistently work out. You want to write code? Consistently write code just for two hours a day.
If you cannot move the mountain, climb the mountain.
You cannot avoid social media. Stop struggling from it... if you cannot avoid it, master it, rule it.
It is not possible to master time management. You can manage only people.
Modern problems requires modern solution.
Hanji, ye python ki series hai, jisme hum python ke bare me seekhenge. Ye series hindi me hai, jisse aapko samajhne me aasani hogi.
Is series me hum python ke basics se lekar advance tak ke topics cover karenge. Bht saara behind the scenes bhi seekhne ko milega.
Please isme koi PR request na kare.
Check out 'chai aur react' playlist on YouTube. It's really a fun to watch series on 'chai aur code' YouTube channel. From basics to production grade.
Will be dropping an awesome series on git and github series. All insights and fun way to learn git. Done with recording. They are in editing phase now.

Very interesting perspective here. For some it always feels absurd money but for some, it's value for money. 'Maybe that guy can make 25 lakh per month from that website.' The moment you hear this, that's a different perspective now.
Can you build a startup right after college? Or should you first take a job? I get this question a lot from students across India.

If a college will reach out to an industry person/teacher/youtuber, he will charge fees. That's why most colleges put students in front to reach out to be guest in colleges. A college guest should get travel and good hotel stay, not your guest house stay.

Pick up any language and there are good sides and bad sides about it, so there is no perfect answer for this question. Some will prefer Java, some will prefer python. It all breaks down to what you want to build and which language can serve best for your need.
Toh chaliye shuru karte hai.
excerpts.source: https://github.com/hiteshchoudhary/chai-aur-python (channel intro phrasing referenced in repo description)
